books.title: The Lost Joey of Mount Hypipamee
books.description: High in the mossy rainforest of Mt Hypipamee on the Atherton Tablelands, a magical fantasy creature named Thistlewink keeps watch over the creatures of the region. With soft wings and a brave heart, she brings calm to the wild places that need her most.

books.title: Whispers in the Water
books.description: Beneath the shimmering surface of Lake Eacham, a mysterious whisper calls to Thistlewink, the tiny colour-shifting fae creature with a brave heart. When strange ripples and fading magic disturb the peaceful rainforest, Thistlewink and her loyal Shimmerling must journey into a hidden world below the water: glowing caverns, ancient secrets, and gentle underwater creatures reveal a mystery only she can solve. A tender, enchanting adventure about courage, friendship, and the quiet magic that lives in nature.

books.title: The Little Housekeeper's Journal
books.author: HPCreates
books.description: A charming keepsake journal for the little ones who love to help around the house.
